#  Invoice Administrator Guide 
Table of Contents 
##  Lien Waiver Types 
With Procore Pay, payors can create four (4) different types of lien waiver templates to use on their construction projects: _Progress Conditional_ , _Progress Unconditional_ , _Final Conditional_ , and _Final Unconditional_.
#####  Tip
**How do you create a lien waiver template?** See [Create Lien Waiver Templates](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/payor-setup-guide/create-lien-waiver-templates).
[ ](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/invoice-administrator-guide/about-lien-waivers/)
[ Enable Waivers & Set Default Templates ](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/invoice-administrator-guide/enable-waivers--set-default-templates/)

description: This guide shows users with invoice administrators how to manage Procore Pay features with the Invoice Management tools in Procore. | Lien Waiver Types
